name: NFPA 13 Standard for the Installation of Sprinkler Systems

rules.label: Hazard Classification – Density/Area Method
rules.notes_template: Verify hazard classification and density/area design: Light Hazard 0.10 gpm/sf over 1500 sf; Ordinary Hazard 1 0.15/1500; OH 2 0.20/1500; Extra Hazard varies. Adjust per Figure 19.2.3.1.1.
rules.citation: NFPA 13 2022 §19.2.3 / Figure 19.2.3.1.1 – Density/area curves for Light, Ordinary, and Extra hazard classifications.
rules.remediation: Document hazard classification and design density/area on hydraulic calculations; coordinate with §19.3 hose-stream allowance.

rules.label: Sprinkler Spacing – Standard Coverage
rules.notes_template: Verify standard-coverage spray sprinkler spacing: ≤ 130 sf/sprinkler (Light), ≤ 130 sf (OH), with max 15 ft spacing (LH/OH) and minimum 6 ft between sprinklers.
rules.citation: NFPA 13 2022 §10 – Standard-coverage spray sprinkler spacing limits and obstruction rules.
rules.remediation: Verify sprinkler layout against §10 area/spacing tables and beam/obstruction rules.

rules.label: One- and Two-Family Sprinklers
rules.notes_template: If residential sprinklers are required (IRC §R313 adoption), design per NFPA 13D: minimum 10-minute water supply (single-story / area < 2000 sf), 7-minute pump test.
rules.citation: NFPA 13D 2022 – Residential sprinkler systems for one- and two-family dwellings and townhouses.
rules.remediation: Design per NFPA 13D and coordinate with water-service sizing.
